messages.text: BL-467 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-467" (or "reject BL-467 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Pin the pipeline board as the ONLY pinned message in the Telegram group; continuously unpin everything else
How it works: The pin sync enforces the board as the single pin only when it is not already the top pin
